title: Plush Argentinian Beef Empanadas
description: Rich and silky Argentinian empanadas filled with beef, wrapped in shortcrust pastry and steamed in banana leaves, perfect for festive occasions.
instructions: Preheat the steamer to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine flour and cold butter to make the pastry dough.
Gradually add cold water to the dough and knead until smooth.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
In a pan, cook the ground beef with onion, salt, and pepper until the beef is browned.
Add beef broth to the pan and stir to combine.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture onto the center of each pastry circle.
Fold the pastry in half and press the edges to seal.
Wrap each empanada in a banana leaf and steam for 20 minutes.
